title: Grindstone epoch-verification verdict (local-tier agentic gate output, a disk contract)

pass.description: true ONLY if EVERY criterion is met by the actual artifacts.

per_criterion.description: Per-criterion judgement with the artifact evidence behind it. The free-text criterion/evidence are unbounded: the whole verdict is persisted on disk and delivered to the planner by reference (it reads the file), never embedded byte-capped into a prompt.

gaps.description: Concrete unmet-criterion gaps surfaced to the planner on a fail (unbounded length; delivered by reference via the persisted verdict file).

digest.description: Descriptive steering summary (NOT a grade): what the epoch actually produced, key structure/decisions, what is notably incomplete or risky, for the planner choosing the NEXT epoch. Never affects pass/fail; optional (defaults to empty). Unbounded length; the planner reads it from the persisted verdict file, never from an embedded prompt block.
